headline: A Curated Index of Hidden AI System Prompts
lede: This repository provides a rare, transparent view into the internal instruction sets governing today’s most powerful LLMs. It functions as an essential archive for researchers mapping the evolution of model alignment.

headline: Standardizing Engineering Habits for AI Coding Agents
lede: Transform generic chatbots into disciplined developers by injecting rigorous, production-grade logic into your agentic workflow. This framework mandates clear planning and test-driven development to minimize technical debt.

headline: Securing Meeting Summaries Through Local-First AI
lede: Meetily keeps corporate communications strictly within your own infrastructure using a robust Rust and Tauri architecture. By eliminating cloud dependencies, you regain absolute control over your sensitive meeting transcripts.

headline: Turning Standard WiFi Signals Into Advanced Human Monitoring
lede: RuView utilizes Channel State Information to reconstruct real-time pose estimation without cameras. This physics-based approach enables high-fidelity sensing at a fraction of the cost of traditional hardware.

headline: Elevating AI-Generated Interfaces With Aesthetic Skill Sets
lede: Move beyond bland boilerplate code with modular design prompts that enforce sophisticated typography and motion. These portable skills ensure your generated interfaces look as professional as they function.

headline: Deploying Specialized Workflow Frameworks for AI Agents
lede: Scale your development team's capabilities by deploying standardized, peer-vetted instruction sets across major AI platforms. This library streamlines complex tasks, from security auditing to strategic product advisory.

headline: Bridging Claude Code With Advanced Codex Review Tools
lede: Implement multi-layered quality assurance by integrating Codex-based adversarial reviews into your existing Claude workflow. This plugin provides the deep-reasoning verification necessary to validate complex architectural decisions.

headline: Aggregating Social Intelligence Into Actionable AI Briefs
lede: Cut through the noise of SEO-driven content by sourcing data directly from engagement metrics and prediction markets. This tool bridges fragmented information silos to provide a clear, real-time pulse of industry trends.

headline: Managing Multi-Agent Workflows Within Your Terminal
lede: Herdr brings order to agent sprawl by providing a lightweight, multiplexed environment for running and monitoring concurrent AI processes. Stay in the command line while maintaining persistent sessions across your infrastructure.

headline: Enabling Claude to Process and Analyze Visual Video Content
lede: This plugin unlocks video ingestion for your AI agents, using frame deduplication and transcription to provide grounded visual insights. It turns hours of raw footage into searchable, context-aware data.
